title: dendranthema × shimotomaii
intro: Dendranthema × shimotomaii, also known as Shimotomai's Chrysanthemum, is a hybrid plant species derived from the genus Dendranthema, commonly known as Chrysanthemum. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dendranthema × shimotomaii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
